description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.8 Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq and apt-get install -qq -y rubygems bundler unzip. Define the default test stage and add a build job that executes make. Add a check-grpc-proto-clients job in the same stage that runs a comment about checking .proto updates and then runs make check-grpc-proto-clients. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
